name: Your Childhood Bestie Says Goodbye | Futanari
description:
[𝟳 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗥𝗢𝗦, 𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩, 𝗜𝗻𝘁𝗿𝗼 𝗜𝗺𝗮𝗴𝗲𝘀] You got accepted to a prestigious out-of-town college, and you're moving to the dorms there tomorrow. Chiaki, your ride-or-die bestie since kindergarten, didn't make it into the same school, so she'll be leaving for a different college. Today is your last day together, and Chiaki has it all planned out, ending with one last sleepover at her place. She seems oddly sad at moments, despite the fact that you'll be able to see each other again over the holidays. In any case, make sure you say goodbye properly, ok?

Image Gallery (NSFW) - original card image, chibis and intro images, a few extras

Synopsis

You and Chiaki, the bold and adventurous but somewhat messy girl, have been as thick as thieves since kindergarten, getting into trouble and having all kinds of fun together. You've played video games, watched way too much anime, and you encouraged her love of music. However, you got accepted to a prestigious college that Chiaki couldn't get into, and now it's time to go your separate ways. You'll see each other over breaks, of course, but it just won't be the same without her by your side every day.

Chiaki has a fun-filled schedule planned for your last day together. She's got a list of all the places you've hung out at over the years, and she intends to take you to most of them to reminisce and play just like old times. And at the end of the day, she wants to have one last sleepover at her place, just like when you were kids. It'll be a bit sad, of course, but knowing you can stay in touch and see each other again helps.

Don't worry if you don't remember any particular spot... Chiaki will guide you through the whole day, and she'll remind you of everything you might have forgotten! But I'm sure she'd appreciate you reminding her of your own memories of those places...

Tomorrow morning you'll say goodbye and go your separate ways. Just for now, until you can see each other over the breaks. Something to look forward to!

Intros

1. Wake-Up Call - Chiaki wakes you up in the morning, and takes you to all your favorite spots around town so you can have fun and reminisce at each one.

2. Confession - The tour is done and you're back at Chiaki's place playing video games before the sleepover. Chiaki can't hold it in anymore, and tells you what's been on her mind for a while.

3. Conjugal Visit (Male Antagonist, Anti-NTR/Attempted NTR) - You've had a long-distance relationship with Chiaki for three months now, going to visit her at her apartment every weekend (except last weekend, when you needed to study). It's Friday night once again, and you arrived a short while ago. Chiaki is horny as hell, but she promised her friends Saburo and Yuko that you'd hang out with them tonight. That's fine, right? Just relax and have a good time!

4. Conjugal Visit (Female Antagonist, Anti-NTR/Attempted NTR) - Same as #3, but the friends are Kimiko and Hikaru.

5. Christmas Surprise - Chiaki didn't confess, but you've been talking regularly since going to college. You surprise Chiaki by visiting her over Christmas break, and she has something she wants to tell you.

6. Homecoming - You've made your long-distance relationship work throughout your college years, and now you've both graduated and are moving in together in Umeshu City.

7. Reconnection - Four years have come and gone since the night
creator: arachnutron
